title: lotus cruentus
intro: Lotus cruentus, also known as the "blood lotus" or "lotus with blood," is a rare and ancient medicinal plant native to Egypt. It is a variant of the Egyptian blue lotus (Nymphaea caerulea) with a distinctive red or reddish-purple coloration. The medicinal properties of Lotus cruentus include its potential to treat insomnia, anxiety, and other nervous system disorders due to its alkaloid content, including nuciferine and aporphine. Herbal preparations of Lotus cruentus can be used in teas, tinctures, and capsules to harness its health benefits, which may include improved sleep quality, reduced stress levels, and enhanced cognitive function.
